title: Phyllorkis cernua
taxonomy: Phyllorkis cernua is a genus in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the subfamily Orchidoideae. The Orchidoideae subfamily is a part of the larger order Asparagales, which also includes lilies and asparagus. Phyllorkis cernua is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Africa. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Phyllorkis cernua is one of the most diverse and widespread groups of flowering plants.
